Package com.adrewdev.functional

package com.adrewdev.functional
  • Class
    Description
    Maybe<T>
    Represents a value that may be present (Some) or absent (None).
    MaybeAsync<T>
    Represents a future value that may or may not exist.
    MaybeAsyncMatcher<T,R>
    Matcher interface for pattern matching on MaybeAsync instances.
    MaybeMatcher<T,R>
    Matcher interface for pattern matching on Maybe instances.
    Result<T,E>
    Represents a successful or failed operation.
    Result.Pair<T,U>
    A simple immutable pair for holding two values.
